videos.title: 5 AM Synth Dreams - Chill Retro LoFi Beats to Sleep/Study
videos.description:
Slow down and relax to this ambient synthwave lo-fi music tape. Perfect for late-night study, sleeping, or coding.

Tracklist:
00:00 - Midnight Wandering
02:30 - Neon Rain Drops
05:15 - Retro Pillow Starlight
08:00 - Restless Echoes

Hope this helps you relax. Don't forget to subscribe for more ambient tracks!

videos.title: Night Drive with the Synthzhu - Melancholic Retro Beats
videos.description:
A late-night cruise under neon signs with slow, emotional synthesizers and vintage lo-fi textures.

Tracklist:
00:00 - Synthzhu Dream Cruise
03:15 - Headlights in the Rain
06:45 - Soft Paw Patrol

Relax and let the soundwaves wash over you.
